data.title: Taiwan Stock Market Continues Downward Trend
data.description: The Taiwan stock market opened on a softer note, continuing its recent downward trend. According to RTHK, the weighted index was reported at 32,247 points earlier, marking a decline of 270 points or 0.83%.

data.title: KB Kookmin Card Collaborates with Avalanche and OpenAsset for Hybrid Payment Model
data.description: KB Kookmin Card is partnering with Avalanche and OpenAsset to create a hybrid payment model that integrates stablecoins with its existing card payment infrastructure. According to NS3.AI, this initiative seeks to facilitate digital asset payments while maintaining the current card payment system. The collaboration aims to enhance the flexibility and efficiency of transactions, offering users a seamless experience in managing both traditional and digital currencies.

data.title: Hong Kong Stocks Open Higher as Midea Group Rises Over 4%
data.description: Hong Kong stocks opened with gains, as the Hang Seng Index rose by 0.27% and the Hang Seng Tech Index increased by 0.08%. According to Jin10, Midea Group (00300.HK) saw a significant rise of over 4% in its stock price. In contrast, Pony.ai (02026.HK) experienced a decline of approximately 7%.

data.title: The US Solomon Islands (SOL) spot ETF saw a net outflow of $6.1743 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the SOL spot ETF saw a net outflow of $6.1743 million yesterday (March 30th, Eastern Time). Only the Bitwise Solana Staking ETF (BSOL) experienced a net outflow yesterday, with a single-day net outflow of $6.1743 million, while its historical total net inflow has reached $792 million. As of press time, the SOL spot ETF's total net asset value is $802 million, with an SOL net asset ratio of 1.69%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $979 million.

data.title: U.S. Stock Futures Rise as Gold Prices Increase and Oil Declines
data.description: U.S. stock futures for the three major indices have turned positive, showing gains, according to Odaily. Meanwhile, gold prices have experienced a short-term increase, while oil prices have seen a decline.

data.title: Australia Investigates Compliance of Major Social Media Platforms with Under-16 Ban
data.description: Australia's cybersecurity regulatory body is conducting an investigation into Meta Platforms Inc., Snap Inc., TikTok, and YouTube regarding their adherence to a ban on social media usage for individuals under 16 years old. According to Ming Pao, this marks the first formal assessment of how these technology giants are responding to the country's pioneering regulatory measures aimed at protecting young users. The investigation seeks to ensure compliance with the restrictions designed to safeguard minors from potential online risks.

data.title: The new address received 450 BTC from FalconX, worth approximately $30.27 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a newly created address received 450 BTC from FalconX, worth approximately $30.27 million.

data.title: US stocks closed lower across the board for crypto stocks, with HODL falling more than 10.81%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the close of trading on the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.11%, the S&P 500 fell 0.39%, and the Nasdaq Composite fell 0.73%. The crypto sector generally declined, with HODL falling over 10.81%, ALTS falling over 8.94%, ABTC falling over 8.14%, MARA falling over 2.81%, MSTR falling over 3.64%, and CRCL falling over 4%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Gold rose 0.37% on the day, while crude oil climbed more than 1%, reflecting a divergence in global market trends.
data.description: According to the latest data from Gate, gold prices rose to $4,528.14 per ounce, a daily increase of 0.37%. Silver prices rose to $70.007 per ounce, a daily decrease of 0.12%. The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 55.00, a daily increase of 1.21%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 74.92, a daily increase of 1.24%. In the foreign exchange market, the USD/CNH exchange rate rose 0.05% to 6.91860. The USD/JPY exchange rate rose 0.08% to 159.866. In global stock indices, the Euro Stoxx 50 rose 0.99% to 5,508.15 points; the UK FTSE 100 fell 0.18% to 10,056.43 points; and the German DAX 40 fell 0.28% to 22,392.85 points. In commodities, WTI crude oil rose 1.01% to $106.53 per barrel, while Brent crude oil rose 0.85% to $113.60 per barrel. Gate allows users to directly trade traditional financial market products on its platform, providing a one-stop solution for precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration of crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi features have been fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to easily participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities outside the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: Wall Street Faces Uncertainty Amid Global Recession Fears
data.description: Wall Street's expectations for a prosperous 2026 have been overshadowed by growing concerns of a global recession. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X, highlighting the shift in investor sentiment as economic indicators suggest potential downturns. Analysts are closely monitoring international markets and economic policies, which could significantly impact financial stability. The focus has shifted from anticipated growth to strategies for mitigating potential risks. Investors are advised to remain cautious as they navigate these uncertain times.

data.title: Robinhood: Cryptocurrency notional trading volume so far in March is $16 billion; prediction market trading volume is $2.6 billion.
data.description: Robinhood released its platform trading data for the period from Sunday, March 1st to Friday, March 27th, 2026: 1. Equity notional trading volume was approximately $196 billion. 2. Options contract trading volume was approximately 187 million contracts. 3. Cryptocurrency notional trading volume was approximately $16 billion, of which the Robinhood App's notional trading volume was approximately $5 billion and Bitstamp's notional trading volume was approximately $11 billion. 4. Event contracts (prediction markets) trading volume was approximately $2.6 billion. Full operational data for March 2026 will be released as part of its Q1 2026 financial results.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump Open to Ending War Amidst Closed Strait, Reports Say
data.description: According to Jin10, U.S. President Donald Trump is reportedly willing to end the ongoing conflict even if the strait remains closed. This news has led to a short-term surge in U.S. stock index futures, with the Nasdaq currently up by 0.5%. Meanwhile, WTI crude oil has quickly erased its intraday gains and turned negative, while gold has seen a modest rise, with its gains expanding to 0.7%.

data.title: Wang Chun Sells Pattaya Apartment for 7 Bitcoins
data.description: Wang Chun, a notable figure in the cryptocurrency community, recently sold his apartment in northern Pattaya, Thailand, for 7 bitcoins. According to NS3.AI, Chun originally purchased the property in 2015 for 2,900 bitcoins. The apartment holds personal significance for Chun as it was his first property and the location where he developed and launched the Zcash mining pool.

data.title: US stock futures turned positive, and gold prices rose in the short term.
data.description: According to Gate data, futures for the three major U.S. stock indexes rallied and turned positive, gold prices rose in the short term, while oil prices fell.

data.title: The US XRP spot ETF saw a total net outflow of $2.3075 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the XRP spot ETF saw a net outflow of $2.3075 million yesterday (March 30th, Eastern Time). Only the Grayscale XRP Trust ETF (GXRP) experienced a net outflow yesterday, with a single-day net outflow of $2.3075 million, while its historical total net inflow has reached $119 million. As of press time, the XRP spot ETF's total net asset value is $929 million, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.14%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $1.209 billion.

data.title: An account with a win rate exceeding 58% purchased $247,000 worth of bets on the 76ers' victory over the Heat in the NBA regular season game; currently, it is down $32,000.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, an account with a winning percentage exceeding 58% (address: 0x07b8e44b90cc3e91b8d5fe60ea810d2534638e25) placed a $247,000 bet on the 76ers defeating the Heat in the Polymarket "NBA Regular Season 76ers vs. Heat" prediction event. The average opening price was $54.7¢, and the current unrealized loss is $32,000. The NBA regular season 76ers vs. Heat game started at 8:00 AM Beijing time today. The NBA regular season is currently nearing its end. The 76ers have a record of 41 wins and 33 losses, ranking 7th in the Western Conference; the Heat have a record of 39 wins and 36 losses, ranking 9th in the Eastern Conference. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before prices are priced in.

data.title: Australia's Private Sector Loan Growth Meets Expectations in February
data.description: Australia's private sector loans grew by 0.6% in February, aligning with market expectations, according to Jin10. This follows a previous growth rate of 0.50% in January, indicating a steady increase in lending activity within the country's private sector. The consistent growth reflects stable economic conditions and confidence among businesses in Australia.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Palliser Capital Targets AI Opportunities in Japan with Ajinomoto Stake
data.description: UK-based activist fund Palliser Capital is broadening its search for undervalued AI opportunities in Japan, acquiring a stake in the seasoning manufacturer Ajinomoto. Bloomberg posted on X, citing sources familiar with the situation, that Palliser Capital is focusing on companies that could benefit from advancements in artificial intelligence. This move highlights the growing interest in AI-related investments in Japan, as companies seek to leverage technology for growth and innovation.

data.title: U.S. Stock Market Fluctuates Amid Uncertain U.S.-Iran Ceasefire Prospects
data.description: The U.S. stock market experienced fluctuations as uncertainty surrounding the potential ceasefire between the United States and Iran heightened concerns. According to Ming Pao, U.S. Treasury yields fell to a one-week low, with yield spreads showing mixed developments. The Golden Dragon Index continued its decline for the third consecutive day, reaching an 11-month low. Meanwhile, U.S. stocks hit a six-month low, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average initially dropping before recovering.

data.title: Baidu's Apollo Go Launches Fully Autonomous Commercial Operations in Dubai
data.description: On March 30, Baidu's Apollo Go officially commenced its fully autonomous commercial operations in Dubai. According to Jin10, this marks a significant milestone for the company as it expands its autonomous driving technology beyond China. The launch in Dubai is part of Baidu's broader strategy to establish a global presence in the autonomous vehicle industry. Apollo Go aims to provide efficient and safe transportation solutions, leveraging advanced AI and machine learning technologies to navigate urban environments without human intervention. This development is expected to enhance Dubai's smart city initiatives and contribute to the region's technological advancement.
